envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Aha Moment Map intake identifies first-week value per role / department / connector / workflow. Composes against Wave 2.1 §22 first-week aha moments + Wave 6 connector-priority matrix. Suggest-only; first real activation Founder-gated.

items.name: Aha Moment Map Assessment
items.description: Stage B intake substrate for the Aha Moment Map. Surfaces first-week value per role / department / connector / workflow. Composes against Wave 2.1 §22 per-role first-week aha moments + Wave 6 connector-priority matrix top 3 (Slack 16.00 + Google Workspace 13.33 + Project Tracker 12.75).
items.human_readable_summary: Asks which aha moments would create first-week value. Outputs Aha Moment Map candidates pending admin approval. Suggest-only; first real connector activation Founder-gated.
items.model_usage_notes: Use Wave 2.1 §22 + Wave 6 matrix as starter priors. Slack first per ADR-0084 substrate-grounded recommendation, but C2 first-connector decision remains Founder-gated.
required_questions: Which first-week aha moments would create most value per role (admin / executive / IC)?
Which department should activate first (highest aha density)?
Which first admin wins would build trust fastest (governance visibility / safe surfacing / Map review)?
Which first executive wins would create leadership confidence (executive brief / governed transparency / decision-cockpit)?
Which first IC / general employee wins would build day-one adoption (corrections / safe drafts / first-week aha)?
optional_questions: Which first connector read-first value would unlock most aha (Slack catch-up / Google Workspace search / Project Tracker risk surface)?
Which first workflow recommendation would create most value (Stage 2 recommendation-only) per ADR-0081?
Which safe fallback value exists without connectors (template-based aha moments)?
Which Wave 6 connector top-tier candidate aligns with the company's first-week priority?
admin_questions: Which aha moments should the Map propose at first activation?
Which aha moments require Founder-gated decisions (e.g., first real connector activation)?
Which aha moments must NOT be in scope for the initial rollout?
user_questions: Which aha moments would feel most valuable to you in week one?
Which aha moments would feel intrusive or unsafe?
evidence_sources: Wave 2.1 §22 per-role first-week aha moments at docs/ootb-catalog/role-depth/
output_candidates: Aha Moment Map proposal (per-role + per-department + per-connector + per-workflow first-week wins)
First-connector read-first candidate (Founder approval required per ADR-0084)
First-workflow Stage 2 recommendation candidate per ADR-0081
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every aha-moment activation
Workflow Stage 2+ progression governance-bound per ADR-0081
User must confirm aha-moment proposals feel safe
Safe-fallback aha moments available even when no connectors activate
safe_defaults: Wave 6 matrix as starter prior, not autonomous activation
forbidden_defaults: Aha moments that violate Risk Map exclusions
DMW_scope_implications: Aha Moment Map proposes per-role DMW scope priorities (which categories deliver fastest aha)
Safe-fallback aha moments operate inside baseline DMW scope only
First-connector aha proposals require per-connector RULE 21 research arc before DMW provenance lights up
User confirmation required before DMW scope reflects an aha-moment proposal
